name: Locke v. Karass
question: Do union requirements that nonmember employees pay a service fee through a pooling arrangement, and used to fund litigation that may not specifically be for the benefit of those nonmembers, violate the First Amendment rights of those nonmember employees?
description: A case in which the Court found that fees paid by union nonmembers which were not used to specifically benefit those nonmembers did not violate the First Amendment.
